Off Calendar Jun-14-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EXTRON CO.'s MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS FOR LACK OF PERSONAL JURISDICTION.

GRANT. No opposition filed. The Court will execute the proposed order.
